jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at BSE
jsonLd.description:
We at BSE are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About BSE:
BSE is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSE!
